title: Interpersonal Merging and End of Eva
display_title: Interpersonal Merging and End of Eva
wikitext:
[]: Interpersonal Merging and End of Eva             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Tue Apr 27, 2010 5:01 am I'd like to see you express it all. Specifically in the Third Impact sequence. I don't even care what it means to Anno right now, what does it mean to you? it is an orgy of the melding of and individual self into another self, or a collective self, I m interested how that makes the members fo this forum feel. Nothing canon is relevant here, just sex and fucking and the merging of persons into another, whether on an individual level or on a collective level, what does it mean to you? This is my question. What does the dissolution of yourself into another mean to you, and perhaps, what does it mean to the others you have dissolved yourselves into mean? What are you if you can't be someone else's? What does this story and animation and film say to you about becoming part of someone else? Yes it is a vague and cryptic question, but go with it and say what it means to you. Nobody will judge. In some ways I think it is the ultimate question of Eva. What does it mean to you to be part of somebody else?

[]: Re: Interpersonal Merging and End of Eva             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Apr 27, 2010 5:16 am SenorSquiid wrote: This is my question. What does the dissolution of yourself into another mean to you, and perhaps, what does it mean to the others you have dissolved yourselves into mean?

[]: Re: Interpersonal Merging and End of Eva             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Tue Apr 27, 2010 5:17 am Xard wrote: Annihilation. Collapse of existence and its categories, return to Collective Unconcious of nature and fullfillment of the mad aim of Buddhist thought and Hegelian bs dialect. in other words: BAD STUFF

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 27, 2010 5:37 am Seems close enough to this to make me rather tempted to merge.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Apr 27, 2010 12:56 pm Death. Sex isn't very fun when there's only consciousness involved. It just becomes masturbation. Except you don't have any hands, so fuck.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Apr 27, 2010 1:03 pm "Hell, is other people" — Sartre

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 27, 2010 1:53 pm There is a certain appeal about the chance to unclench one's ego and just let it all flow out. @AuraTwilight One word -- frottage.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Apr 27, 2010 1:59 pm Which version of 3I are we talking about? It makes quite a difference. EoE: Fleeting moment of absolute terror or perfect bliss (depending on general outlook) as you are melded with the collective experience of humanity before passing into undifferentiated non-being. Is this suicide or Buddhist enlightenment? EoTV: Passing a personal gauntlet of insecurities and self-deception, the self is never actually lost but rather just refined to a single instance through negotiation with others with whom you share a bond. Afterwards, graduate to variable bubble universe via spiritual upload scenario in a persistent lucid dream-like state that allows either isolation or group networking.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Apr 27, 2010 9:46 pm Having all sense of security, identity, and definition (and lack there of) ripped away leaving the raw ego to rub against one another until nothing can be distinguished. A moment of raw, absolute intimacy that never ends while the rest of the universe goes on without you.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 27, 2010 10:45 pm I don't know how anyone is supposed to reasonably imagine what a non-self existence would be like to make any kind of surmise about this. It would probably be similar to being back in the womb, I guess. Having a very vague sense of life but nothing beyond that.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Apr 28, 2010 12:43 pm Like loosing consciousness. In one last accord, everything would lose meaning. Infinite entropy (in the inforamtion theroy sense). No, scratch that, you wouldn't even know that there are things that need to be made sense of. .... I wonder what the people of Earth thought when they just randomly tanged?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 29, 2010 3:41 am Would the product of all minds being melted together into a selfless soup be meaningfully different from there being one giant mind? I must contemplate this before I can proceed with my personal thread response... NemZ wrote: Afterwards, graduate to variable bubble universe via spiritual upload scenario in a persistent lucid dream-like state that allows either isolation or group networking.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 29, 2010 1:40 pm Reichu wrote: DAMMIT TINES NEMZ.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 29, 2010 1:46 pm And the student becomes the teacher...? Anyway, I need to give this thread some thought, myself before coming up with a good reply. THIS INVOLVES DEEP THINKING.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 29, 2010 3:22 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Death. Sex isn't very fun when there's only consciousness involved. It just becomes masturbation. Except you don't have any hands, so fuck.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Apr 29, 2010 4:30 pm Sorry, there was a typo in my original post. It was meant to be "one consciousness", not just consciousness itself.

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:41 pm People will have no freedom, because they cannot be dishonest. Everyone will be forced to function as a single will, eliminating creativity/originality/authenticity, i.e. free will.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Apr 29, 2010 7:23 pm Could be good or bad. In an ideal world, we could enter and leave Instrumentallity at will.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 29, 2010 7:57 pm TehDonutKing wrote: Could be good or bad. In an ideal world, we could enter and leave Instrumentallity at will.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 29, 2010 8:12 pm NemZ wrote: see also: EoTV
